name: DON'T OPEN
short_description: DONT OPEN is a PSX-style horror game about routine that falls apart before your eyes. A normal shift at a taco bar, an empty stairwell, and a persistent knock on the door that's impossible to ignore. Based on real events.
detailed_description:
Heavy iron doors separate my little world from the cold hallway. It's always so unsettling there.

DONT OPEN is a PSX-style horror game about routine that falls apart before your eyes. A normal shift at a taco bar, an empty stairwell, and a persistent knock on the door that's impossible to ignore. Based on real events.

HOME IS YOUR FORTRESS. UNTIL YOU LOOK THROUGH THE PEEPHOLE. Your life is a cycle. The day begins in a noisy cafe where you prepare tacos and pour Coke for an endless stream of customers. You spend your evenings in an old apartment, surrounded by dusty belongings and “dead trees on canvas.” But today, your usual routine will be disrupted. DON'T OPEN is a brief immersion into a state of paranoia. There are no monsters or weapons here. There is only you, your neighbors, and a growing sense of fear behind the front door.

FEATURES: Life as it is: from work shifts to mundane household chores — feel the weight of everyday routine. Disturbing neighbors: chance encounters in the hallway. A strange old man or a neighbor suddenly running out of their apartment — who poses a real threat? Hypnotist: a surreal, hypnotic event that will make you question reality right in your living room. 90s aesthetics: low-poly environments and shaky textures recreate the authentic spirit of classic horror. Sound as the enemy: knocks on the door, footsteps in the hallway, and TV interference replace the traditional soundtrack.

reviews.review_text: An eerie PSX-style atmosphere hooks you from the first seconds. An empty stairwell and that persistent knock on the door that makes your heart drop. You play and feel someone watching you. Genuine chills from the thought that this is based on real events. Very simple, but frighteningly realistic to the point of trembling.
The game's plot begins with you being in a strange house, where increasingly creepy things start to happen. The atmosphere is serious, with few screeches, but the tension is constant.

an excellent representative of the horror genre. The developers have done an excellent job of creating an oppressive atmosphere and intense gameplay. The game offers interesting puzzles and unexpected plot twists that will keep even the most experienced players engaged. I highly recommend checking it out.
Loved the game but I didn't like of serving the customers for 3 tacos even though they say 1 but overall 7/10
